genericSuggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Quit it, pause active work, or stop background tasks if you do not need it on battery.

categories.name: Security tooling
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Check for an active scan or update, but do not disable security tooling just to save battery.

categories.name: Display server
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Lower brightness, disconnect extra displays, or close graphics-heavy windows.

categories.name: Thermal management
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Reduce heat or stop other high-CPU work so macOS can leave thermal management sooner.

categories.name: Browser or web content
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Close or pause browser tabs, video, calls, or heavy web apps you do not need on battery.

categories.name: Containers or virtual machines
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Stop local containers or VMs you do not need on battery.

categories.name: Developer tools or builds
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Pause builds, indexing, agent sessions, or background developer tasks you do not need on battery.

categories.name: Chat or calls
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Leave calls, pause screen sharing, or quit chat helpers you do not need on battery.

categories.name: Media processing
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Pause media playback, video processing, or photo analysis until you are on power.

categories.name: Sync or storage
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Pause sync-heavy work or let file syncing finish while plugged in.

categories.name: Device management
categories.suggestion: {app} is using high current impact (power {power}, CPU {cpu}%). Check whether device management is installing updates or running inventory; do not disable required management tooling.
